description: Replayed (humanProof, agentProof) pair with a previously-used sessionNonce. The circuit will generate a valid witness (it is stateless), but the verifier MUST reject the proof because the nullifierHash has already been consumed for this scope.
failure_reason: Nonce replay: the (nullifierHash, scope) pair from the HumanUniqueness step has already been consumed in a prior session. The verifier must maintain a nullifier set and reject duplicate nullifierHash values for the same scope. This is identical to the valid_handshake witness — the circuit is stateless, so replay detection is the verifier's responsibility.

meta.notes: This vector reuses the same witness inputs as valid_handshake. The replay semantics are: if valid_handshake was already verified, this identical proof must be rejected.
